name: SKY130 PWM Wordline Driver for CIM

linearity_pct.description: Max deviation of pulse width from ideal linear relationship with input code

rise_time_ns.description: Output rise time (10% to 90%) driving 100fF load

fall_time_ns.description: Output fall time (90% to 10%) driving 100fF load

power_uw.description: Average power per driver at 3MHz operation

t_lsb_ns.description: Duration of one LSB pulse width step
